text: Hearing 'Bye. Bye. Bye.' as I stand in this corridor, I feel a sense of transition—of doors closing, both literally and metaphorically. The R+D wall inside beckons with the promise of curiosity and progress, yet the repeated farewells echo like a gentle nudge to move on. Am I leaving or am I left behind? There is a slight ache of parting, yet also a quiet wonder at what lies beyond the glass.
